statement: This is a layout integration candidate with sub-block evidence, not a full-chip EM-verified design. Inter-block coupling, package, transitions, and whole-tile modes are not modeled.

IDC.scope: FasterCap extraction of the geometry-identical IDC sub-block
IDC.limitation: FasterCap extraction of the geometry-identical IDC sub-block

CPW.scope: openEMS preparation for the geometry-identical CPW sub-block
CPW.limitation: openEMS preparation for the geometry-identical CPW sub-block

SpiralInductor.scope: FastHenry extraction of the geometry-identical spiral sub-block; no tile prompt target
SpiralInductor.limitation: FastHenry extraction of the geometry-identical spiral sub-block; no tile prompt target

Resonator.scope: Nominal 6 GHz resonator reference sub-block; not embedded in the current tile geometry
Resonator.limitation: Nominal 6 GHz resonator reference sub-block; not embedded in the current tile geometry

AlignmentMarksAndLabels.scope: Alignment marks and title labels in the assembled tile
AlignmentMarksAndLabels.limitation: Non-electrical geometry; no solver model applies.
